inputs.text: Bachcha ko bukhar hai, thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, sir dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Generic symptoms of fever and fatigue

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation suggest a gastrointestinal issue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever is still present, but other symptoms are more prominent

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Still a possibility, but other symptoms are more likely

inputs.text: Tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai, bahut kamzor mehsoos ho raha hu

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Classic symptoms of typhoid fever, including fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as the symptoms are more severe and specific

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but the symptoms are more consistent with typhoid

inputs.text: Bachcha puri tarah se thak gaya hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai, pet dard bahut badh gaya hai
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Symptoms have worsened, and the patient is at risk of intestinal perforation

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as the symptoms are more severe and specific to typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as the symptoms are not consistent with malaria
